meaning: 浼婂熀鎵樻柉[绉橀瞾涓滃寳閮ㄥ煄甯俔
examples: At least six large boats have been stranded near the port city of Iquitos.
In the city of Iquitos, in northern Peru, 10 to 50 of the 400,000 residents die of the disease every year, many more than succumb to malaria.
Iquitos and other towns in Peru's rainforest region have no road links to the rest of the country, and depend on the Amazon and its tributaries for transport.
Iquitos was put on the world map during the rubber boom in the late 1800s.
Webster hopes to build a permanent clinic in Belen, a slum on the outskirts of Iquitos.
